concerns.text: User Story 3 states: 'determine whether the joint invariants show explanatory power for geometric complexity.' Combined with FR-005's 'test relationships' language, this risks implying causal/inferential claims. The plan correctly acknowledges census-data limitations (FR-006, Assumptions section) and mathematical constraints (FR-005: 'definitional relationship'). Align this language to 'describe variance attribution' or 'characterize joint associations' to avoid overclaiming.
